description: The birth of Formula 1, where brave pioneers raced on the edge, defining the sport's spirit and laying its foundations.

drivers.name: Juan Manuel Fangio
drivers.bio: The Maestro. Dominated the early years with unmatched skill and intelligence.

drivers.name: Alberto Ascari
drivers.bio: Italy's first F1 superstar, known for precision and speed.

drivers.name: Giuseppe Farina
drivers.bio: The first ever F1 World Champion.

description: A time of rapid innovation: rear engines, aerodynamics, and the rise of British teams. Safety slowly improves.

drivers.name: Jim Clark
drivers.bio: Effortless speed and versatility, a natural talent.

drivers.name: Graham Hill
drivers.bio: The only driver to win the Triple Crown of Motorsport.

drivers.name: Jack Brabham
drivers.bio: Driver and constructor, a true innovator.
drivers.highlights: 3x World Champion, only driver to win in his own car.

description: Dramatic rivalries, increased speed, and ever-present danger. Legends are born in the face of risk.

drivers.name: Niki Lauda
drivers.bio: The comeback king, famed for his resilience.

drivers.name: James Hunt
drivers.bio: Charismatic, daring, and a fan favorite.

drivers.name: Emerson Fittipaldi
drivers.bio: Brazil's first champion, smooth and strategic.
drivers.highlights: 2x World Champion, youngest champion at the time.

description: The golden age of rivalries: Senna vs Prost, turbo monsters, and the ultimate test of skill and courage.

drivers.name: Ayrton Senna
drivers.bio: A genius in the wet, spiritual and intense.

drivers.name: Alain Prost
drivers.bio: The Professor, master of racecraft and strategy.

drivers.name: Nelson Piquet
drivers.bio: Technical, witty, and a triple champion.

description: Electronics, aerodynamics, and the rise of superteams. Schumacher's reign and fierce competition.

drivers.name: Michael Schumacher
drivers.bio: The benchmark of excellence, relentless and precise.

drivers.name: Mika Häkkinen
drivers.bio: The Flying Finn, Schumacher's greatest rival.

drivers.name: Fernando Alonso
drivers.bio: Fiercely competitive, broke Schumacher's streak.
drivers.highlights: 2x World Champion, youngest champion at the time.

description: Short but dynamic: new rules, KERS, and the rise of new stars. F1 becomes a global entertainment powerhouse.

drivers.name: Jenson Button
drivers.bio: Smooth style, 2009 fairytale champion.

drivers.name: Sebastian Vettel
drivers.bio: Youngest quadruple champion, Red Bull era.

drivers.name: Lewis Hamilton
drivers.bio: Rising star, future record-breaker.

description: Turbo hybrids, Mercedes dominance, and the rise of a new generation of stars.

drivers.name: Lewis Hamilton
drivers.bio: Unmatched in the hybrid era, record-breaker.
drivers.highlights: 6x World Champion in hybrid era, Mercedes legend.

drivers.name: Nico Rosberg
drivers.bio: The only man to beat Hamilton in the hybrid era.

drivers.name: Sebastian Vettel
drivers.bio: Red Bull star, Ferrari challenger.

description: Ground effect returns, new stars emerge, and the sport enters a new age of competition and technology.

drivers.name: Max Verstappen
drivers.bio: Dominant force, rewriting records.
drivers.highlights: Multiple World Championships, Red Bull era.

drivers.name: Charles Leclerc
drivers.bio: Ferrari's hope, fast and fearless.

drivers.name: Lando Norris
drivers.bio: Fan favorite, McLaren's rising star.

drivers.name: George Russell
drivers.bio: Mercedes' new talent, calm under pressure.
